title: wolfhsm: RsaKey::perform exposes raw RSA without padding scheme
description: RsaKey::perform returns raw modular exponentiation output. No padding scheme (PKCS#1 v1.5, PSS, OAEP) is documented or enforced. The RsaOperation enum uses PrivateEncrypt/PublicDecrypt naming that implies textbook RSA. Users cannot safely sign or encrypt without knowing what the server applies. The API should either (a) expose explicit pad-scheme parameters, (b) wrap in named methods (sign_pkcs1, verify_pkcs1, etc.), or (c) document exactly what the wolfHSM server does and refuse to compile unsafe combinations.
